templates.name: Where are your items made / manufactured?
templates.content: All our products are made in the Philippines. We have long-term partnerships with manufacturers in various countries here in Asia. Most of the manufacturers that we take in as suppliers are small to medium-sized, family-owned businesses, and we work very closely with them to ensure that every step in the process is done properly and ethically, and every individual involved is properly compensated and working in ideal conditions.

templates.name: Sales Collection
templates.content: You can take a look at our sale collection here: https://blackboughswim.com/collections/sale

templates.name: How do I take care of my swim bikini?
templates.content: Hand wash separately with cold water and light detergent and dry in shade. Wash immediately after use, especially in pools with high chlorine content. Please do not bleach, do not leave rolled-up wet, do not iron, and get in contact with rough surfaces and sharp objects as they may pull the fabric.

templates.name: Which tops do you recommend for small chests?
templates.content: You can shop styles perfect for smaller chests here: https://blackboughswim.com/collections/light-support-bikini-tops We highly recommend the Tona Top, Liv Top, Sophia Top, and Chloe Top as these will flatter you the most!

templates.name: Do you have non-cheeky bottoms?
templates.content: Yes! These bottoms are perfect for outings with the fam, but still make your bottom look cute. Covered bottoms don't have to be boring! We highly recommend bottoms from our Modest Collection: https://blackboughswim.com/collections/modest-bikini-bottoms

templates.name: What fabric do you use for your swimsuits?
templates.content:
Our swim bikinis are made with the highest quality fabric. Most, if not all, of our suits are made with 80% Recycled Nylon / 20% Spandex. This unique mix creates a velvety, silk-like fabric that caresses and protects your body the way it should while you're out basking under the radiant sun. Our suits will make you feel what a cozy hug is really like. 

You can expect your swimsuits to be lightweight, fast-drying and sweat-wicking, soft and wrinkle-free, stretchy and supple, durable and made to last!

templates.name: When deciding on bottoms size, do I base on my hips or waist?
templates.content: For high-rise bottoms designed to sit high on your waist, we recommend using your waist as a reference. For bottoms designed to be mid-rise, we recommend using the hips as a reference.

templates.name: I submitted multiple reviews and only got points for 2
templates.content: Unfortunately, there's a limit of 2 reviews per order. Any reviews of more than 2 in the same order will no longer be rewarded points.

templates.name: Does my store credit have an expiration date?
templates.content: The store credit via e-gift card doesn't expire and can be used on any product on our site.

templates.name: What should I do if my package says delivered but I don't have it?
templates.content: If the tracking information indicates that your items have been delivered to the address provided on the purchase but you have not received it, please check surrounding houses, doorsteps etc.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: Our hotline isn't operating anymore! Please email us directly at aloha@blackboughswim.com or let me know how I can help.

templates.name: Your products are too expensive / Is the quality worth it?
templates.content: Rest assured we work hard to provide high quality products for our customers and price our items fairly as possible!

templates.name: Can you apply my discount code retroactively?
templates.content: Unfortunately, we can't apply discounts retroactively to orders. I apologize for the inconvenience.

templates.name: Return / Exchange Policy
templates.content: We currently don't offer direct size exchanges, but you can return your item for store credit and use this to repurchase. The store credit equal to the item's purchase price is automatically sent as soon as the item is returned. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://black-bough-swim.reamaze.com/kb/returns

templates.name: What if I get a surprise/mystery bikini  I already have?!
templates.content: No worries, we take previous purchases into account to avoid giving you a bikini pattern or color that you already own for your surprise reward.

templates.name: I saw a phone bikini being advertised! Where/how do I get one?
templates.content: We don't actually sell the phone bikini and that was a cute April Fools' prank we posted for our customers. Jokes aside, we have new prints coming out all the time, and if you need any help picking one out, I'm just a text away.

templates.name: How long does it take to receive the store credit?
templates.content: Your store credit will be issued once you send the item back to us with the provided return label. Make sure to check your spam folder for the credits.

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to email us directly at aloha@blackboughswim.com. Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: I didn't get my Blackbough Bucks (reward points) for my birthday!
templates.content: Just to be sure, when did you add your birthday to your account? Per our policy, you must enter your bday at least 30 days in advance to receive birthday points.

templates.name: Size Guide (IF CX PROVIDES MEASUREMENTS, TELL THEM THE SIZE)
templates.content: Specific styles may run smaller or larger than normal, and this is indicated in the individual product descriptions. If you're in between sizes or you're unsure, I recommend you take the larger size. You can check out our size chart here: https://blackbough.attn.tv/sl/4YZTdQl7

templates.name: Where are you located/ Where do you ship from?
templates.content: We are located and ship from the Philippines.

templates.name: Can I get a cash refund instead of store credit?
templates.content: If you'd like to convert store credit to a refund back to your original payment method, email us directly at aloha@blackboughswim.com within 14 days of the gift card issuance for approval of the refund.  All returns for cash refunds are subject to a 10% restocking and refund fee unless waived due to exceptional circumstances. Note your order's original shipping charges are non-refundable, as this has already been paid to the courier for the initial delivery to you. If you opt for store credit, our restocking fee won't apply.

templates.name: Are returns free?
templates.content: If you're in the US, we offer free return shipping via mail using prepaid shipping labels. For returns from other countries, you may ship to our partner warehouses at your cost. Check out the instructions for returns here: https://black-bough-swim.reamaze.com/kb/returns/what-is-the-return-process

templates.name: I submitted a review but did not see my Blackbough Points
templates.content: Make sure that you submitted a review using the same email you used for your purchase in order for our system to verify and reward you correctly. If you wrote a review using the product page widget, please wait a few hours for our system to verify your credentials.

templates.name: Rewards
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://blackboughswim.com/pages/blackbough-beach-club

templates.name: Which tops are padded?
templates.content: Tops that are padded are Natalie, Cindy Push Up, Skyla, Thea Scoop, Alana Bandeau, and Penny halter.

templates.name: Are your suits padded?
templates.content: We have a collection of padded suits which you can check out here: https://blackboughswim.com/search?q=padded+tops Also, most of our suits that aren't padded are double-lined so they're not see-through when wet.

templates.name: What do you recommend for busty women? / I have large breasts
templates.content:
For bustier girls, we recommend the following tops:

Cindy top: https://blackboughswim.com/products/cindy-top-coastal?_pos=1&_sid=c784f7175&_ss=r 
Willow top: https://blackboughswim.com/products/willow-top-celestial-shimmer?_pos=6&_sid=492b4b61f&_ss=r 
Georgia top: https://blackboughswim.com/products/georgia-top-cosmo-crush?_pos=1&_sid=4d8a64352&_ss=r 
Amelia top: https://blackboughswim.com/products/amelia-top-pina-colada?_pos=2&_sid=b9a418aba&_ss=r 
Bella top: https://blackboughswim.com/products/bella-top-wild-petunia?_pos=1&_sid=9d2bd3f50&_ss=r

These have adequate support and built-in underwire.

templates.name: What size is the model wearing?
templates.content: The measurements of the model can be found under the "Fit" section, let me know if you can't find it and I'd be happy to check for you.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss wholesale is to email us directly at partnerships@blackboughswim.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/blackboughswim/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/blackboughswim/

templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to email us directly at partnerships@blackboughswim.com. Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Do you offer a birthday discount?
templates.content: We don't give discounts on bdays, but if you signed up on our site and input your birthday into our rewards widget on the lower left of the screen a month before, you'll receive 2000 points on your birthday that you can use for rewards. You can sign up and read about it here: https://blackboughswim.com/pages/blackbough-beach-club

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time usually takes 1-2 business days, unless we're running a sale in which case it will take a couple of days longer. We usually ship via DHL, and once shipped, it will take 2-5 business days to receive your order.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://blackboughswim.com/collections/sale

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Restock? (autosend enabled)
templates.content: I currently don't have the exact date of a possible restock, but I recommend signing up on the product page so you're notified the second it comes back in!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: You can find us at a store near you here: https://blackboughswim.com/pages/stockists

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on orders over $125. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Can I pay with a debit or credit card?
templates.content:
All orders are processed via PayPal Checkout, but you should still be able to complete your purchase with a credit/debit card -- no need to log in or sign up for a PayPal account.

Once you checkout and complete your purchase, you will be redirected to PayPal Checkout. On the bottom part of the page, there should be a button that says "Pay with Debit or Credit Card."

templates.name: Size Chart: All - Clothes
templates.content: You can take a look at our size chart here: https://blackboughswim.com/pages/blackbough-size-guide
